overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage showing a futuristic spaceship descending from orbit toward a vast ice-covered planet. The third-person camera follows the craft as it approaches the snowy surface, with blue thrusters glowing against the stark white and grey planetary terrain.

events.description: spaceship wings sweep back into high-speed configuration

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship in high orbit above the ice planet, maintaining steady forward thrust with glowing blue engines

entered.detail: massive ice-covered planetary body dominating the background with white and grey surface textures
black space vacuum with distant stars visible around the planetary horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a futuristic spaceship flying through orbital space. The craft maintains a steady trajectory above a massive ice planet that fills the center of the frame, its surface showing patches of exposed dark rock against the white ice. At approximately 8 seconds, the ship's wings sweep back into a streamlined configuration as it continues its orbital path.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude approach over glacial terrain

events.description: spaceship begins descent from orbit toward the planetary surface

agents.ego_description: actively descending toward the ice planet's surface, maintaining controlled flight as terrain details become prominent

segments.scene_description: The spaceship transitions from orbital flight to a descent phase, rapidly approaching the planet's surface. The icy terrain fills increasingly more of the frame, revealing detailed glacial ridges, mountain peaks, and snow textures. The starfield becomes obscured as the camera focuses on the approaching ground, with the ship maintaining a steady descent trajectory toward the white landscape below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic spaceship transitions from a high orbital trajectory to a rapid descent toward a frozen planetary surface. It begins in the void of space, tracking the craft as it glides above a massive ice planet marked by patches of exposed dark rock. As the ship's wings sweep back into a streamlined configuration, the camera accelerates its approach, causing the distant planetary sphere to expand and fill the frame. The starfield gradually fades into the background as the view shifts toward the ground, revealing the intricate textures of glacial ridges and jagged mountain peaks. The scene finally culminates in a steep dive, with the stark white and grey landscape rushing upward to meet the descending vessel.
